items.title: Indian Navy Agniveer Apprentice 01/27 & 02/27
items.qualificationShort: Matriculation 50% aggregate + 3-yr AICTE polytechnic diploma 50% (Engineering or Electrical streams per advt)
items.ageLimitShort: 01/27: DOB 01 Dec 2004–31 May 2009; 02/27: 01 May 2005–31 Oct 2009; unmarried male only
items.feeShort: Stage I INET: Rs 550 + 18% GST (online); no separate Stage II fee
items.selectionProcessShort: Stage I: INET 2/2026 (online); Stage II: PFT, written exam, recruitment medical; state-wise merit
items.notificationWindowText: Application window extended till 1700 hrs on 05 Jul 26 as per official Indian Navy website.
items.examWindowText: Stage I INET Aug 26; results end Aug/early Sep 26. Stage II 01/27 Oct 26, 02/27 Mar 27. Training Dec 26 / May 27. Tentative per advt.
items.trustNote: Official PDF QA completed on 2026-06-29. Trade-wise vacancy count not declared in advt. Publish to live page only after final manual review.

items.title: Indian Navy SSC Various Entries — Jun 2027 Course
items.notificationWindowText: Application window live from 25/06/2026 to 27/07/2026 as per Indian Navy homepage.
items.examWindowText: Official advertisement देखें
items.trustNote: Homepage dates verified on 2026-06-29. PDF QA pending — no Apply button until entry-wise official advertisement is confirmed.

items.title: SBI Probationary Officer (PO) 2026-27
items.qualificationShort: Graduation (Bachelor's degree); category-wise marks as per advt; final-year if degree by 30.09.2026
items.feeShort: Rs 750 for General/OBC/EWS; nil for SC/ST/PwBD per advt
items.selectionProcessShort: Phase I: Online Preliminary; Phase II: Main; Phase III: Psychometric test, Group Exercise & Interview
items.notificationWindowText: Online registration and fee payment 18.06.2026 to 08.07.2026 as per SBI advertisement CRPD/PO/2026-27/09.
items.examWindowText: Phase I Prelims tentative Aug 2026; Phase II Mains Sep 2026; Phase III GE/Interview Oct–Nov 2026. Tentative per advt.
items.trustNote: Official PDF QA completed on 2026-06-29 from SBI detailed advertisement CRPD/PO/2026-27/09. Apply only via official IBPS registration link.

items.title: New India Assurance Apprentice FY 2026-27
items.organisation: The New India Assurance Co. Ltd.
items.vacanciesText: 550 Apprenticeship training seats (state-wise reservation per advt)
items.qualificationShort: Graduation completed; passing mark sheet dated 01.01.2022 to 01.06.2026 inclusive; NATS profile 100% complete
items.ageLimitShort: 21–30 years as on 01.06.2026 (DOB 01.06.1996–31.05.2005); SC/ST/OBC/PwBD relaxation per advt
items.feeShort: Gen/EWS/OBC Male Rs 944; Female Rs 708; SC/ST/PwBD Rs 236 (incl. GST per advt)
items.selectionProcessShort: Online written test (BFSI SSC) + Regional Language Test at document verification; merit state/category-wise
items.notificationWindowText: Online registration 23.06.2026 to 06.07.2026 via NATS portal; then BFSI SSC application and fee on beep.bfsissc.com per official advertisement.
items.examWindowText: Online examination 12.07.2026 as per official advertisement. Stipend Rs 12,300/month for 12-month apprenticeship.
items.trustNote: Official PDF QA completed on 2026-06-29 from Apprentice Advertisement 2026-27.pdf. Apprenticeship engagement — not a regular job. Apply via NATS first, then complete BFSI SSC registration and fee payment.

items.title: UPSC Recruitment Advertisement No. 07/2026
items.feeShort: Rs 25; Female/SC/ST/PwBD exempted as per official PDF
items.selectionProcessShort: Shortlisting / Recruitment Test if held / Interview as per post
items.notificationWindowText: Online recruitment applications invited from 27/06/2026; closing 17/07/2026 18:00 per official UPSC Advertisement No. 07/2026.
items.examWindowText: Interview/RT dates to be announced separately per official notice
items.trustNote: Official PDF verified on 2026-06-29. Umbrella card — post-wise details in official advertisement. Split into post-wise cards before wider publish if needed.

items.title: Central Bank of India Apprentice FY 2026-27
items.vacanciesText: 4500 Apprenticeship training seats (state-wise; tentative per advt)
items.qualificationShort: Graduation on or after 01.01.2022; registered on NATS portal
items.ageLimitShort: 20–28 years as on 31.05.2026 (DOB 31.05.1998–31.05.2006); SC/ST/OBC/PwBD relaxation per advt
items.feeShort: Gen/EWS/OBC Male Rs 944; Female Rs 708; SC/ST/PwBD/Transgender Rs 236 (incl. GST per advt)
items.selectionProcessShort: Online test (BFSI SSC) + Local Language Test; 12-month apprenticeship; stipend Rs 15,000/month per advt
items.notificationWindowText: Original window 12.06.2026–22.06.2026; extended to 28.06.2026 per official CBI notification dated 22.06.2026. Application closed — preparation/archive only.
items.examWindowText: Online examination tentative 1st week of July 2026 per original notification. Confirm updates on centralbank.bank.in only.
items.trustNote: Official PDF QA on 2026-06-29. Last date 28.06.2026 passed — archived; not shown in public verified section. Apprenticeship only; no apply link.
